title: pypodman commit: argument --change/-c: invalid choice
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**kind bug**


**Description**
`pypodman commit` does not work with option `--change`.
<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
On remote machine:
```
root@localhost libpod]# podman version
Version:       0.10.1
Go Version:    go1.10.4
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64
```
```
[root@localhost libpod]# podman info
host:
  BuildahVersion: 1.5-dev
  Conmon:
    package: podman-0.10.1-1.gite4a1553.fc28.x86_64
    path: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 1.12.0-dev, commit: 452812fc5539855eb472129ff1132919a0e756be-dirty'
  Distribution:
    distribution: fedora
    version: "28"
  MemFree: 1119850496
  MemTotal: 2089267200
  OCIRuntime:
    package: runc-1.0.0-55.dev.git578fe65.fc28.x86_64
    path: /usr/bin/runc
    version: 'runc version spec: 1.0.0'
  SwapFree: 2147479552
  SwapTotal: 2147479552
  arch: amd64
cpus: 2
  hostname: localhost.localdomain
  kernel: 4.16.3-301.fc28.x86_64
  os: linux
  uptime: 4h 46m 36.86s (Approximately 0.17 days)
insecure registries:
  registries: []
registries:
  registries:
  - docker.io
  - registry.fedoraproject.org
  - quay.io
  - registry.access.redhat.com
  - registry.centos.org
store:
  ContainerStore:
    number: 2
  GraphDriverName: overlay
  GraphOptions:
  - overlay.mountopt=nodev
  - overlay.override_kernel_check=true
  GraphRoot: /var/lib/containers/storage
  GraphStatus:
  Backing Filesystem: xfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "true"
    Supports d_type: "true"
  ImageStore:
    number: 5
  RunRoot: /var/run/containers/storage
```
```
[root@localhost ~]# podman ps -a
CONTAINER ID   IMAGE                             COMMAND     CREATED          STATUS                      PORTS   NAMES              IS INFRA
dcbafa59eff0   docker.io/library/fedora:latest   /bin/bash   58 seconds ago   Exited (0) 40 seconds ago           heuristic_snyder   false
```
On host machine:
```
# hostnamectl
Static hostname: localhost.localdomain
Transient hostname: dhcp-2-7.nay.redhat.com
         Icon name: computer-laptop
           Chassis: laptop
        Machine ID: cd196ab74fbf40448d31037ceafbcf05
           Boot ID: 1e04aea17e044ac886ba0630c1b34dc1
  Operating System: Fedora 27 (Workstation Edition)
       CPE OS Name: cpe:/o:fedoraproject:fedora:27
            Kernel: Linux 4.18.7-100.fc27.x86_64
      Architecture: x86-64
```
```
python3 --version
Python 3.6.6
```
1. [install podman python3 package](https://github.com/containers/libpod/tree/master/contrib/python/podman)

2. [install pypodman](https://github.com/containers/libpod/tree/master/contrib/python/pypodman)

3. `pypodman -l root --host 192.168.122.28 commit --change CMD=/bin/bash --change ENTRYPOINT=/bin/sh --change LABEL=blue=image heuristic_snyder image-commited`

**Describe the results you received:**
```
# pypodman -l root --host 192.168.122.28 commit --change CMD=/bin/bash --change ENTRYPOINT=/bin/sh --change LABEL=blue=image heuristic_snyder image-commited
2018-10-22 19:56:02 CST | ERROR    | pypodman commit: argument --change/-c: invalid choice: 'CMD=/BIN/BASH' (choose from 'CMD', 'ENTRYPOINT', 'ENV', 'EXPOSE', 'LABEL', 'ONBUILD', 'STOPSIGNAL', 'USER', 'VOLUME', 'WORKDIR')
2018-10-22 19:56:02 CST | ERROR    | Try 'pypodman commit --help' for more information.
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
Can successfully create the image. 

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
` pypodman -l root --host 192.168.122.28 images` can work. On remote machine `podman commit` with the same options can properly create the image.


**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
physical
